800000.label: €800,000 minimum
800000.summary: Prime zone under Law 5100/2024: Attica region, Thessaloniki regional unit, Mykonos, Santorini, and certain high-population islands.

400000.label: €400,000 minimum
400000.summary: Standard built-residential tier for mainland Greece and regional destinations outside the prime zones.

250000.label: €250,000 minimum
250000.summary: Conversion or heritage-restoration route only, not a general location tier.

locations.name: Elliniko / Athenian Riviera
locations.notes: Attica region including Ellinikon regeneration area.

locations.name: Thessaloniki suburbs (east/west)
locations.notes: Thessaloniki regional unit; verify cadastral municipality.

locations.name: Chania, Crete
locations.notes: Crete is outside Attica prime zones, standard €400K tier.

locations.name: Heraklion, Crete
locations.notes: Crete qualifies at €400K in current program practice.

locations.name: Elounda / Lasithi, Crete
locations.notes: Crete, €400K tier; check 120m² rule on premium micro-markets.

locations.name: Rhodes
locations.notes: Regional island, €400K tier in standard buyer routing.

locations.name: Paros
locations.notes: Verify island population register, may move to €800K if above 3,100 residents.

locations.name: Naxos
locations.notes: Verify island population register before offer.

locations.name: Milos
locations.notes: Smaller Cycladic island, typically €400K; confirm with lawyer.

locations.name: Commercial-to-residential conversion (anywhere)
locations.notes: €250K conversion route, not a geography shortcut for standard residential.

locations.name: Listed heritage restoration (anywhere)
locations.notes: €250K restoration route, specialist legal and technical path.
